title: BlockPlayer
body:
This is a mod that allows players to turn into any block, which has been open-sourced on GitHub.

You can use the command `/to-block <block>` to turn into any block. When in block state, the item currently held by the player will not be displayed. If you want to exit the block state, you can do so by re-entering the world or using the command `/rest` to exit the block state.
